tasks.subject: Task 1: i18n keys for all four locales
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Display-size + sidebar-resize strings to en/zh-Hans/ru/ar so later tasks can reference them and the parity gate stays green.

**Files:** src/i18n/locales/{en,zh-Hans,ru,ar}.json

**Verify:** npm run qa:i18n

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/i18n/locales/en.json","src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json","src/i18n/locales/ru.json","src/i18n/locales/ar.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run qa:i18n", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 4 locales have settings.display.* + app.sidebar.resizeLabel","non-English values are real translations","qa:i18n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: UI scale logic module + safe-storage helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure module clamping/loading/saving the UI scale factor + applying it via a --ui-scale custom property, plus a shared safe-storage helper.

**Files:** src/lib/safeStorage.ts, src/display/uiScale.ts, src/display/uiScale.test.ts

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/display/uiScale.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/safeStorage.ts","src/display/uiScale.ts","src/display/uiScale.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/display/uiScale.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clampUiScale clamps [0.8,1.5] rounds 2dp defaults non-finite","load/save round-trip + degrade on hostile/absent storage","applyUiScale sets/clears --ui-scale, no-ops without document"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: UiScale context provider
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Provider holding the scale factor, applying + persisting on every change and on mount, exposing useUiScale() — mirrors ThemeProvider.

**Files:** src/display/UiScaleContext.tsx, src/display/UiScaleContext.test.tsx

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/display/UiScaleContext.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/display/UiScaleContext.tsx","src/display/UiScaleContext.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/display/UiScaleContext.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["defaults to 100% applies on mount","setScale clamps/applies/persists","useUiScale throws outside provider"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: UiScaleSlider control
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Settings range slider (80-150%, step 5%) with live % readout + Reset-to-100% button, wired to useUiScale.

**Files:** src/components/UiScaleSlider.tsx, src/components/UiScaleSlider.test.tsx

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/UiScaleSlider.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/UiScaleSlider.tsx","src/components/UiScaleSlider.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/UiScaleSlider.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["labelled slider defaults to 100% with % readout","moving slider scales + persists","reset returns to 100% and clears scale"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire UI scale into the app
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mount UiScaleProvider (app + test providers), add :root zoom rule + slider styles, surface the slider as a Display-size card in Settings → General.

**Files:** src/App.tsx, src/__test__/providers.tsx, src/styles.css, src/views/Settings.tsx, src/views/Settings.test.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build && npx vitest run src/views/Settings.test.tsx (+ manual smoke)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/App.tsx","src/__test__/providers.tsx","src/styles.css","src/views/Settings.tsx","src/views/Settings.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npx vitest run src/views/Settings.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UiScaleProvider in app + AllProviders","zoom rule + slider styles in styles.css","Display size card with slider in Settings","build clean + Settings test passes","manual: scaling works + persists"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Sidebar width logic module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure module clamping/loading/saving the sidebar width (px), mirroring the uiScale module.

**Files:** src/display/sidebarWidth.ts, src/display/sidebarWidth.test.ts

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/display/sidebarWidth.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/display/sidebarWidth.ts","src/display/sidebarWidth.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/display/sidebarWidth.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clampSidebarWidth clamps [200,420] rounds int defaults non-finite","load/save round-trip + degrade on hostile/absent storage","default width is 248"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Resizable-sidebar hook + handle component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** useResizableSidebar hook (drag + keyboard + double-click-reset, RTL-aware, persists on commit) + a role=separator handle component.

**Files:** src/hooks/useResizableSidebar.ts, src/components/SidebarResizeHandle.tsx, src/hooks/useResizableSidebar.test.tsx

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/hooks/useResizableSidebar.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useResizableSidebar.ts","src/components/SidebarResizeHandle.tsx","src/hooks/useResizableSidebar.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/useResizableSidebar.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drag changes width clamps persists on mouseup","arrow keys nudge + persist; double-click resets","RTL flips direction","handle exposes separator + aria-value*"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Wire the resizable sidebar into the app
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive .gf-sidebar width from the hook, render the handle, add handle + width-var CSS — completing the resizable sidebar.

**Files:** src/App.tsx, src/styles.css, src/App.test.tsx

**Verify:** npm run build && npx vitest run src/App.test.tsx (+ manual smoke + npm run qa:unit)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/App.tsx","src/styles.css","src/App.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npx vitest run src/App.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sidebar width from --gf-sidebar-width set by hook","handle renders with col-resize + hover/focus, below window handles","build clean + App.test passes","manual: drag resizes + persists, long labels fit"]}
```
